SimpleConstruction: Periodically evaluates the current build queue to prioritize pending tasks and determines a strategic sequence for at least ten upcoming constructions.
ConstructionWithPos: Prioritizes pending projects and determines a sequence of at least ten new constructions with exact [x, y] grid placements.
SimpleProduction: Systematically determines the production sequence of unit types from factories to maintain a consistent and strategic military force.
ProductionWithFactory: Manages individual factory outputs by determining the exact sequence and type of units to be produced at each specific facility.
SimpleMovement: Systematically assigns movement targets to individual units by designating precise [x, y] coordinates on the grid for tactical maneuvering.
GroupMovement: Organizes combat units into tactical squads, excluding non-combatants like commanders or builders, and directs their movement to precise [x, y] coordinates using specific engagement commands.
